title: capsicum annuum var. microcarpum
intro: Capsicum annuum var. microcarpum, also known as the small-fruited chili pepper, is a variety of the Capsicum annuum plant, characterized by its small, edible fruit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of consuming Capsicum annuum var. microcarpum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Capsicum annuum var. microcarpum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems.
